info.name: E-Commerce Platform API
info.description: Full backend collection for the ADHD Proud e-commerce platform.

request.description: POST /api/shop/ai-suggest/ — Natural-language style request. Returns { message, products[] }. Requires GOOGLE_API_KEY in .env.

item.name: Get Profile Stats (Orders / Wishlist / Addresses Count)
Payment (Stripe)
item.description:
Stripe Checkout integration.

STEP 1: POST to 'Create Checkout Session' â†’ get session_url + order_number
STEP 2: Open session_url in browser â†’ pay with test card 4242 4242 4242 4242
STEP 3: Stripe CLI (running in Docker stripe-cli service) fires the webhook automatically
STEP 4: GET the order to confirm payment_status = 'paid'

Test cards:
  Success: 4242 4242 4242 4242
  Decline: 4000 0000 0000 0002
  Requires auth: 4000 0025 0000 3155

body.raw:

header.description: Stripe CLI generates this automatically. For manual dev testing without signature, temporarily set STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET to empty string in .env.

item.name: Admin — Users
item.description: Endpoints for logged-in admin/user password management. Requires JWT token.

request.description: POST /api/users/change-password/ — Requires IsAuthenticated. Changes password for the currently logged-in user.
GET /api/admin/profile/ — Returns id, full_name, email, phone, avatar.
PATCH /api/admin/profile/ — multipart/form-data. avatar is optional.

item.name: Admin — Dashboard
item.description: Dashboard overview data. All require is_staff=True.

request.description: GET /api/admin/dashboard/stats/ — Returns total_orders, total_products, total_customers, total_revenue.
GET /api/admin/dashboard/chart/?period=week — Returns 7 days of order counts [{date, orders}].
GET /api/admin/dashboard/transactions/?limit=5 — Returns latest N orders as transactions.

item.name: Admin — Orders
item.description: Admin order management. All require is_staff=True.

request.description: GET /api/admin/orders/ — Paginated list of ALL orders. Optional ?status=Pending|Shipped|Delivered|Cancelled
PATCH /api/admin/orders/{order_number}/ — Allowed status values: Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled.

item.name: Admin — Products
item.description: Admin product CRUD. All require is_staff=True.

request.description: POST /api/admin/products/ — multipart/form-data. Creates product + image + size variants.
PATCH /api/admin/products/{id}/ — All fields optional. Replace {id} with real product ID.
DELETE /api/admin/products/{id}/ — Returns 204 No Content. Replace {id} with real product ID.

item.name: Admin — Customers
item.description: Admin customer management. All require is_staff=True.

request.description: GET /api/admin/customers/ — Paginated list of all non-staff users with order stats.
PATCH /api/admin/customers/{id}/ — Updates name, email, phone. Replace {id} with real user ID.
DELETE /api/admin/customers/{id}/ — Returns 204 No Content. Replace {id} with real user ID.
GET /api/admin/notifications/ — Returns the latest 50 notifications.
POST /api/admin/notifications/mark-read/ — Marks all unread notifications as read.

item.name: Admin — Blog
item.description: Admin blog management. All require is_staff=True.

request.description: GET /api/admin/blog/categories/ — Returns all categories (unpaginated) for dropdown.
GET /api/admin/blog/ — Paginated list of all blog posts.

formdata.value: Discover techniques specifically designed for the ADHD brain.

## Introduction
Living with ADHD can be challenging but also rewarding...

request.description: POST /api/admin/blog/ — multipart/form-data. Slug auto-generated from title. Author set to logged-in admin.
GET /api/admin/blog/{id}/ — Retrieve a single post by ID.
PATCH /api/admin/blog/{id}/ — All fields optional. Replace {id} with real post ID.
DELETE /api/admin/blog/{id}/ — Returns 204 No Content.
